homepage.heroTagline: Where Little Steps Lead to Bigger Dreams 🌈
homepage.heroDescription: Nurturing curiosity, confidence, discipline, and holistic child development through quality English-medium education.

about.heroSubtitle: Where Little Steps Lead to Bigger Dreams
about.introLead: Growing Minds English School is a newly opened English-medium, co-educational institution dedicated to providing quality education from Nursery to 8th Standard.
about.introText: We believe in nurturing curiosity, confidence, and discipline in every child through a holistic approach to learning. Our school is built on the foundation of creating a safe, caring, and stimulating environment where children can explore, learn, and grow into responsible, ethical, and confident individuals.
about.vision: To be a leading educational institution that empowers young minds to become confident, compassionate, and capable individuals who contribute positively to society.
about.visionExtra: We envision a learning environment where every child's unique talents are discovered and nurtured, preparing them for a successful future.
about.mission: To provide quality English-medium education that focuses on academic excellence, character development, and holistic growth.
about.missionExtra: We strive to create a nurturing environment where children feel safe, valued, and inspired to reach their full potential.

values.title: Care & Compassion
values.description: We treat every child with love, respect, and understanding, creating a warm and supportive atmosphere.

values.title: Academic Excellence
values.description: We maintain high educational standards while making learning engaging, interactive, and meaningful.

values.title: Character Building
values.description: We instill strong moral values, ethics, discipline, and confidence in every student.

values.title: Inclusivity
values.description: We celebrate diversity and create an environment where every child feels welcomed and valued.

values.title: Holistic Growth
values.description: We focus on developing academic, physical, social, and emotional well-being.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: We encourage creativity, curiosity, and critical thinking to prepare students for the future.

about.approachLead: At Growing Minds, we place the child at the center of everything we do. Our educational approach is designed to:

approachPoints.title: Recognize Individual Potential
approachPoints.description: Every child is unique, and we tailor our teaching methods to suit different learning styles.

approachPoints.title: Foster Curiosity
approachPoints.description: We encourage questions, exploration, and discovery-based learning.

approachPoints.title: Build Confidence
approachPoints.description: Through positive reinforcement and supportive guidance, we help children believe in themselves.

approachPoints.title: Develop Life Skills
approachPoints.description: Beyond textbooks, we focus on communication, teamwork, problem-solving, and emotional intelligence.

approachPoints.title: Promote Ethics & Values
approachPoints.description: We integrate moral education into daily learning, teaching respect, honesty, and responsibility.

activitiesSection.title: Student
activitiesSection.subtitle: Art, sports, music, and hands-on learning beyond the classroom

activities.title: Creative Art & Craft
activities.description: Students explore colors, shapes, and imagination through painting, collage, and seasonal craft projects.
activities.body:
Art and craft sessions are among the most loved parts of our week. Children experiment with watercolors, crayons, paper craft, and recycled materials while learning to express ideas in their own way.

Each month follows a cheerful theme — festivals, seasons, nature, and community helpers — so every child takes home something they are proud to show their family.

Our teachers guide students step by step while encouraging creativity and confidence. Finished work is often displayed in classrooms and corridors, celebrating every child's effort and joy in learning.

activities.title: Sports & Outdoor Play
activities.description: Fun games and physical activities that build teamwork, coordination, and healthy habits.

activities.title: Music, Dance & Rhythm
activities.description: Rhythm, movement, and expression help children build confidence and celebrate culture.

activities.title: Science & Discovery
activities.description: Simple experiments and curious questions make learning exciting — from nature walks to classroom demos.

activities.title: Festivals & Celebrations
activities.description: Students learn about traditions, perform on stage, and share joy during school celebrations.

activities.title: Story Time & Reading Club
activities.description: Books, storytelling, and library time nurture language skills and a lifelong love of reading.
